seo.title: Jean-Charles Barq | Product Engineer & Full Stack Developer
seo.description: Freelance Product Engineer based in Marseille, France. I help B2B teams turn complex business workflows into clear, reliable web products — with or without AI.

hero.label: Product Engineer · Full Stack Developer · AI Integration
hero.accroche:
I help B2B teams turn

complex business workflows

into clear,

reliable and maintainable

web products.
hero.opinion: — The right product is the one your team can maintain without you.
hero.subphrase: React / TypeScript · Node.js / NestJS · AI Integration

about.title: About
about.paragraph_1: A Full Stack Developer and Product Engineer for over 6 years, I help companies design and build B2B web products, SaaS platforms and internal tools.
about.paragraph_2: I get involved from the earliest stages of a project: understanding the business need, talking with users, clarifying user journeys, prototyping, technical decisions, development. My experience is mainly built on React, TypeScript, Next.js, React Native, Node.js and NestJS — and extends into mobile, UX and branding when the project calls for it.
about.paragraph_3: Based in Marseille, I work remotely and travel occasionally across France for audit and scoping phases.

services.title: Services
services.workflow_desc: Understanding the need, talking with users, clarifying user journeys, prototyping — turning a business workflow into a product, with or without AI.
services.ai_desc: Documentation search, business assistants, automation of repetitive tasks — integrated directly into your existing tools.
services.fullstack_desc: From design to production — custom web applications built with React/TypeScript, Node.js and NestJS.
services.revamp_desc: Modernizing an existing product: ease of use, code quality, testing and maintainability.

projects.title: Recent Projects
projects.scaleway_desc: Technical owner of an internal tool centralizing hardware catalog, assembly manuals, commercial offers and asset tracking into a single interface. Feature-based architecture, requirements gathering, Figma prototyping and full implementation.
projects.stockoss_desc: SaaS platform for logistics and storage management. Frontend & Fullstack contributions.
projects.dgac_desc: Internal application for Air Traffic Management.
projects.moodoow_desc: White-label mobile application platform for sports clubs — powering apps like USM Sapiac, enhancing fan experience.
projects.qb3_desc: Web3 project. Final capstone for Alyra's blockchain developer certification.

cta.title: Ready to Work Together?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project and see how I can help.
